headline: Tool calling broke out as the quarter's dominant technique while agent harnesses and function calling pushed into production.
body: Tool calling led the window with momentum and ratio at 145, the only leading mover and far ahead of a cluster of lagging techniques like multi-model workflow, AI-assisted development, and cache hit rate. Function calling entered as a new outlier alongside this rotation, reflected in production agent work: OpenGov scaled an agent harness across thousands of governments, Google Cloud outlined the five components agent harnesses need, and the Ornith model family shipped with tool-call blocks for agentic coding. System prompts, lost in the middle, and parameterization also appeared as new entrants, while weight perturbation weakened with a ratio of 107 against flat momentum.

cited_items.title: 5 things every AI agent harness needs
Ornith (35B,9B) + Hermes,Zed: THE FULLY PRIVATE LOCAL AGENT is ACTUALLY HERE!
Agents in Production: How OpenGov Built and Scaled OG Assist - Gabe De Mesa, OpenGov
